# BWA-MEM

**Galaxy Tool ID**: `toolshed.g2.bx.psu.edu/repos/devteam/bwa/bwa_mem/0.1`
**Version**: 0.1
**Category**: Mapping

> - map medium and long reads (> 100 bp) against reference genome

## Example Query

> "Run BWA-MEM on my data"

## Run via Galaxy Bridge

```bash
python galaxy_bridge.py --tool-details toolshed.g2.bx.psu.edu/repos/devteam/bwa/bwa_mem/0.1
python galaxy_bridge.py --run toolshed.g2.bx.psu.edu/repos/devteam/bwa/bwa_mem/0.1 --input <file> --output <dir>
```
